mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS declines or stays flat while CPIAUCSL remains contained, the discount-rate channel dominates and equity multiples expand, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day forward SPX returns are not positive in a majority of periods with flat-to-lower FEDFUNDS and subdued CPIAUCSL, or if the rolling 3-year Rank IC falls below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in UNRATE above a short-run threshold signals weakening household income and demand, which compresses earnings expectations and leads to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if triggered episodes deliver positive 20-day SPX returns more than 60% of the time, or if the average forward return after triggers is not below the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: When RSAFS and PAYEMS both improve together, nominal sales growth and payroll expansion confirm broad demand strength, supporting higher S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days through better revenue expectations.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint improvement signal does not outperform either single-series signal in out-of-sample 5-day direction accuracy, or if its conditional win rate stays below 55%.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained rise in INDPRO indicates improving industrial output and supply-side momentum, which raises cyclical earnings expectations and supports positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if 60-day forward SPX returns after INDPRO uptrends are not positive on average, or if the signal loses significance in rolling 4-quarter tests.

mechanism_narrative: When HOUST falls below its recent range, it signals housing demand contraction and weaker future consumption, which depresses S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls below its 6-month moving average by more than 5%
failure_condition: Reject if sub-average HOUST readings are not followed by below-average 20-day SPX returns, or if the triggered sample shows a positive median return.

mechanism_narrative: A combination of elevated FEDFUNDS and rising CPIAUCSL indicates tightening real financial conditions, which should compress equity valuations and produce negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if periods of high FEDFUNDS with rising CPIAUCSL fail to generate negative 60-day returns on average, or if the interaction term adds no predictive power versus either proxy alone.

mechanism_narrative: If PAYEMS growth weakens while UNRATE rises, labor-market slack is increasing faster than headline employment creation, which should precede negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises and PAYEMS declines on a 1-month basis
failure_condition: Reject if the joint labor deterioration pattern does not predict lower 20-day returns, or if positive returns occur in more than 40% of triggered cases.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous acceleration in GDPC1 and RSAFS reflects synchronized real output and nominal spending strength, which supports earnings revisions and positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if joint GDP and retail-sales acceleration does not produce positive 60-day returns on average, or if the signal underperforms a simple market mean benchmark out of sample.
